finding: ESM2-3B median AUROC 0.834 slightly EXCEEDS AlphaMissense 0.823 (gap -0.011); the zero-shot LM now edges the supervised predictor on the median. Full scale trajectory: 35M 0.706 -> 650M 0.811 -> 3B 0.834, crossing AM's 0.823.
caveat: n=7. The crossing is THIN (-0.011) and 3B is NOT uniformly better than 650M — MLH1 (0.671<0.715) and MSH2 (0.684<0.786) regressed vs 650M while PINK1 gained (0.834>0.811); per-protein noise at n=7. AlphaMissense retains home-field advantage (training likely overlaps these clinical labels), so a zero-shot LM edging it is the notable result. PROC stays ~chance for both.
